_provenance: Synthetic Scope Certificates, structurally modeled on Textile Exchange template ASR-204 and the Policy for Scope & Transaction Certificates (TE-TXL-POL-203 v4.0), including the real verification-URL format certificates.textileexchange.org/sc/TE-XXXXXXXX. Data is fictional and labelled on camera.
_definition: A Scope Certificate (SC) verifies a company is QUALIFIED (audited) to produce goods to a given standard. It does NOT prove any specific shipment's content.

scopeProducts.productCategory: knit and woven fabric for outerwear

scope_certificates.note: Confirms Atlas is AUDITED and CAPABLE of producing GRS recycled polyester. Says nothing about the recycled content of any particular shipment.
Confirms Verde is certified organic cotton across the relevant product categories.
